visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins in a bright indoor studio setting. A man in the foreground wearing a white t-shirt and a beige vest sits cross-legged on the floor, gesturing with his hands as he speaks. Behind him, four people are seated on a grey sofa; two women and two men. They are holding black writing slates or clipboards. The room is well-lit with professional studio lighting, and a white cloud-shaped pillow sits on the sofa. (2) The camera transitions to a medium close-up of a young woman with long black hair, wearing a white and maroon baseball-style shirt. She is holding a blue marker and a clipboard, pointing her finger upward while smiling and talking. The background shows a light-colored wall with a shelf containing small decorative items. (3) Returning to the wider shot, the man in the beige vest leans forward and then hangs his head in a mock-despairing pose, resting his forehead on his hand. The group behind him on the sofa reacts with laughter and smiles. Text overlays representing quiz options appear at the bottom of the frame. (4) The group on the sofa reveals their answers by holding up their slates toward the camera. Most slates display the letter 'C' written in white, while one person holds a slate with the letter 'A'. A woman in a pink t-shirt and another in a blue denim jacket are now more clearly visible as the camera pans. (5) A close-up of the woman in the blue denim jacket shows her looking toward the man and speaking. The man continues to gesture with his hands, displaying high energy. The scene remains in the same studio environment with bright, natural-looking colors throughout.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Slogan]: 蔡阿嘎影片知識王#4. [Slogan]: 查照系列中 蔡阿嘎拿過以下哪張證照?. (2) [Variety]: a. 閩南語檢定. [Variety]: b. 乙級廚師證照. [Variety]: c. 保母證照. (3) [Subtitle]: 唯一知道的證照. [Variety]: 不在上面. (4) [Subtitle]: 社工師證照. (5) [Variety]: (概括承受). [Variety]: (沒有走心). [Slogan]: 算了啦無所謂. [Variety]: (我就沒人愛啊). (6) [Slogan]: 以後面試要考試. (7) [Logo]: HAHABABY. (8) [Subtitle]: a&c比較多啊. [Subtitle]: 你們只有兩個選台語. (9) [Subtitle]: 你台語這麼厲害. [Subtitle]: 保母證照. (10) [Subtitle]: 因為我這個台語是考比較難的. [Subtitle]: 你們記憶力很好嘛. (11) [Subtitle]: 甚至有蘿拉. [Subtitle]: 蘿拉也考到了. (12) [Subtitle]: 可以當廚師. [Subtitle]: 甚至幫忙煮麵. [Subtitle]: 那時候就鋪路鋪好.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main host, 6 staff/contestants in the background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A man in his late 30s with short brown hair, wearing a white t-shirt under a beige utility vest, and blue denim shorts.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean, modern studio designed to look like a living room. Features include a grey sofa, wooden flooring, white walls, a white cloud pillow, and a shelving unit with blue mascot plushies.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-energy male voice introduces a question with a rapid speech rate and an enthusiastic, comedic tone. Underneath, a bright and bouncy electronic background music track plays with a steady 4/4 beat. (2) A sharp 'pop' sound effect occurs as text choices appear. This is followed by a female voice responding with a playful, teasing intonation. The background music continues at a consistent volume. (3) A group burst of laughter erupts, with various female and male voices overlapping in a high-arousal state. The male speaker makes a low-pitched mock-whining sound as a sound effect of a slide whistle plays in the background. (4) A bright 'ding' sound effect signifies the correct answer being revealed. The male voice returns to a high volume, enunciating clearly while the music continues. (5) Multiple voices engage in quick back-and-forth chatter, with the sound of pens being used on slates causing minor high-frequency rustling. The music maintains the energetic pace until the end.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Question -> Response -> Reveal -> Commentary.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a trivia challenge or quiz game segment from a popular YouTube creator's channel. It aims to entertain the audience through a humorous interaction between the host and his staff/friends while testing knowledge about the host's personal history and past video content.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The host and staff are wearing clothing from the 'HAHABABY' brand, and the brand logo is prominently displayed as an overlay.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-density information and fast-paced editing typical of social media short-form variety content. The use of '蘿拉' in subtitles refers to a specific recurring person in the creator's universe.
